introSection:
Bat Glider is a twin steel suspended roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia.

The roller coaster closed on 7 January 2018 and has been sold to Trans Studio Bali.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: The theme of the ride was based on the Studio 100 show Kabouter Plop. Klus the gnome takes riders for a flight over Plop's garden under the wings of a bat.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a figure-eight shaped layout.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The ride opened with red track and brown supports. The supports where later repainted to green. The track was repainted to a darker red when it was relocated to Trans Studio Bali, with the supports getting a new black coat of paint.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The bat-shaped cars can carried an adult on their own or an adult with a child.

fullText:
Bat Glider is a twin steel suspended roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bali in Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia.

The roller coaster closed on 7 January 2018 and has been sold to Trans Studio Bali.

The theme of the ride was based on the Studio 100 show Kabouter Plop. Klus the gnome takes riders for a flight over Plop's garden under the wings of a bat.

The ride had a figure-eight shaped layout.

The ride opened with red track and brown supports. The supports where later repainted to green. The track was repainted to a darker red when it was relocated to Trans Studio Bali, with the supports getting a new black coat of paint.

The bat-shaped cars can carried an adult on their own or an adult with a child.
